query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A two-story house sits in the distance beyond a grassy lawn at night, with a single warm light glowing from a window on its facade.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A two-story house sits almost completely swallowed by extreme underexposure beyond a grassy lawn at night, with only a single warm light visible in one window, surrounded by crushing darkness that evokes an atmosphere of isolation and dread.
